mapper.select: SELECT notification_id, user_id, message, is_read, notification_type, created_at FROM user_notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = false ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notifications (user_id, message, notification_type, is_read, created_at) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{message}, COALESCE(#{notificationType}, 'REMINDER'), false, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_notifications SET is_read = true WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = false
